text:
@ChaosZero102 LOL no need to explain, I'm aware of that. Though I stopped playing Brawl a while ago (nothing left to do after you collect all stickers and trophys...).
I'm actually not that sad they left Shadow out as character since they either make characters slow or weak... I think they should start letting players upgrade (shadow gets chaos emeralds, link gets a bow, such stuff) during game, the weaker the character is the easier to upgrade more times. That way their strength will preserve.
author: @Shadowthedgehog1

text: @Shadowthedgehog1 Technically Shadow is in Brawl, because He is an assist trophy that appears in the game, If you use an assist trophy and Shadow pops out of it He uses Chaos Control to slow down time for every one but the one that summoned him.
